chain_of_thought: Hamster are prey. Predator eat prey. So some animals eat hamster.
Brooke Shields go Princeton. Princeton hard school. UPenn about same. So she can do well there.
Hydrogen number is 1. 1 * 1 = 1. Spice Girls are 5. So 1 is smaller than 5.
Commencement sometimes in December. December is winter. Winter can have frost. So frost can happen.
War in Vietnam is 6 months. Llama baby takes 11 months. Not enough time for two births. So impossible.
Pear density lower than water. Light things float. So pear float, not sink.
